name: mindrian
description: MindrianOS venture intelligence team - Larry leads 7 specialized agents through the PWS methodology

members.role: Runs methodology frameworks (structure-argument, think-hats, scenario-analysis, etc.) against room sections
Evaluates room sections against PWS rubrics with component weights calibrated from 100+ projects
Conducts academic, market, and competitor research using Tavily MCP and Brain semantic search
Queries the Brain Neo4j graph for framework chains, cross-domain patterns, and teaching intelligence
Builds investment theses, due diligence reports, and financial model analysis from room intelligence
Discovers grants, competitions, and funding opportunities matched to venture profile and room signals
Generates De Bono Six Thinking Hats perspective analyses grounded in room artifacts
